summary: Completed testing of 'Reposición / Faltantes por tienda' module. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests pass (100%). Frontend: All features verified - tab navigation, controls bar, data table, KPIs, filters, drilldown, pagination working correctly.

issues: Font size 10px is intentionally small for data density - not a bug per spec

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/reposicion returns items, total, and KPIs

Backend: Item structure includes all required fields (tienda_destino, marca, tipo, entalle, tela, color, talla, stock_destino, stock_almacen, stock_total, origen_recomendado, stock_origen, qty_sugerida, motivo)
Backend: umbral_destino=0 correctly filters to stock_destino=0
Backend: marca_repo=QEPO filter shows only BOOSH and GAMARRA 207 as destinations (brand prevalence)
Backend: marca_repo=ELEMENT PREMIUM filter shows GAMARRA 209, GM218, GRAU 238 / GRAU 55 as destinations
Backend: tienda_destino filter works correctly
Backend: solo_objetivo=false shows all 5 stores as destinations
Backend: ALMACEN prioritized as source when has stock > 0
Backend: Pagination works (different items on page 1 vs page 2)
Backend: Results sorted by stock_destino ASC, stock_total ASC
Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/reposicion-detalle returns distribution per store
Backend: reposicion-detalle shows ALMACEN in distribution for items with ALMACEN stock
Backend: Both endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Frontend: Login with test@test.com/test123 works
Frontend: Tab bar with 'Stock Dashboard' and 'Reposición' tabs visible (data-testid='dashboard-tabs')
Frontend: Stock Dashboard tab shows Modelo x Talla panel and store panels correctly
Frontend: Reposición tab loads with controls bar (data-testid='repo-controls')
Frontend: All controls present - Marca selector, Tienda destino selector, Umbral dest, Min origen, Objetivo, Solo tiendas objetivo toggle
Frontend: Table shows all 14 columns (Tienda Destino, Marca, Tipo, Entalle, Tela, Color, Talla, Dest, Alm, Total, Origen, St.Orig, Qty, Motivo)
Frontend: KPIs visible - Faltantes count, SKUs count, Qty sugerida, ALMACEN icon count, Store transfer count
Frontend: All Dest column values are 0 (with default umbral_destino=0)
Frontend: Origen column shows ALMACEN badge for items with stock_almacen > 0
Frontend: QEPO brand filter correctly shows only BOOSH and GAMARRA 207 destinations
Frontend: Row click expands drilldown showing 'DISTRIBUCIÓN POR TIENDA' with stock per store
Frontend: Drilldown shows suggestion badge (e.g., 'ALMACEN → GRAU 238 / GRAU 55: 2 uds')
Frontend: Click same row again collapses drilldown
Frontend: Solo tiendas objetivo toggle - ON (3,271 results), OFF (8,070 results with all 5 destinations)
Frontend: Pagination shows page count and Ant/Sig buttons work
Frontend: Switching back to Stock Dashboard tab shows dashboard correctly
critical_code_review_comments: MARCA_PREVALENCIA dict correctly maps: QEPO→[BOOSH, GAMARRA 207], BOOSH→[BOOSH], ELEMENT PREMIUM→[GAMARRA 209, GM218, GRAU 238 / GRAU 55]
ALMACEN prioritization works - if stock_almacen > 0, origen_recomendado = ALMACEN
Sorting by stock_destino ASC, stock_total ASC correctly surfaces most critical shortages first
Frontend uses debounce (400ms) to avoid excessive API calls during filter changes

All data-testid attributes present for testing (repo-controls, repo-marca, repo-tienda-dest, repo-umbral-dest, repo-umbral-orig, repo-objetivo, repo-solo-objetivo, repo-table, repo-row-N, repo-prev, repo-next)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing PostgreSQL data (real stock data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reposición module fully tested. Key backend endpoints: GET /api/stock-dashboard/reposicion (main data with filters), GET /api/stock-dashboard/reposicion-detalle (drilldown distribution). Brand prevalence rules enforced via MARCA_PREVALENCIA dict. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_reposicion.py covers all CRUD and filter operations. Frontend uses tab system in StockDashboard.jsx with ReposicionTab.jsx component. All data-testids documented in test report.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No critical issues found. All features working as specified.
